info.title: Nexus Partners — Recruiter Portal API
info.description:
REST API for the Nexus Partners recruiter desktop/web app.

## Authentication
1. Call `POST /auth/login` with recruiter username and password.
2. Store the returned `accessToken`.
3. Send `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>` on all protected endpoints.

Recruiter tokens are separate from admin portal tokens (`type: recruiter` in JWT payload).

## Related docs
- **Platform Admin API**: [/api/docs](/api/docs)
- Raw OpenAPI JSON: [/api/docs/recruiter/openapi.json](/api/docs/recruiter/openapi.json)

## Typical flows
**Job apply (with copy/paste side panel)**
1. Login → get token
2. `GET /students` → list assigned students
3. `GET /jobs?studentPhone=...&minExp=2&maxExp=5&sponsored=true` → matched jobs (optional experience + sponsored filters)
4. `GET /jobs/{id}?studentPhone=...` → job detail (includes `isApplied`, `isSponsored`)
5. Option A: `POST /jobs/{id}/apply` → returns `applyUrl` **and** `studentForm` (open URL + show form fields side-by-side)
6. Option B: `GET /students/{phone}/resume-form` anytime to load the same form payload before/after apply

**Application Tracker**
1. `GET /applications` → paginated tracker rows
2. `PATCH /applications/{id}/status` → move through pipeline statuses

**Dashboard / Analytics**
1. `GET /dashboard?range=7d` → KPIs, trend, recent activity
2. `GET /analytics` → status breakdown and conversion

## Notes
- `studentPhone` is the student's phone number (primary identifier).
- Job list excludes jobs previously **dropped** for that student.
- Without `q`, job matching uses the student's role keywords against `jobTitle`. Free-text `q` searches broadly and skips strict role match.
- `minExp` / `maxExp` (aliases `experienceMin` / `experienceMax`) filter jobs by overlapping experience years. Job bands come from explicit years, parsed text, or seniority.
- `sponsored` / `isSponsored` (`true`|`false`) filters jobs that mention visa sponsorship (H1B / sponsor keywords in description or notes).
- Each job includes `isApplied` (student already applied / in pipeline) and `isSponsored` (alias of `visaSponsorship`) for card UI. Prefer these flags over parsing `urlDomain` for display — clients should not show scrape source domains on job cards.
- `scrapedFrom` / `scrapedTo` filter on job `createdAt` (YYYY-MM-DD).
- Pagination: `page` is zero-based; jobs default `limit` 20 (max 50); applications/resume-library default 50 (max 100).
- Application statuses: `saved`, `applied`, `interview_scheduled`, `interview_completed`, `offer_received`, `hired`, `rejected`, `dropped`.
- Resume Library entries are created automatically on Fix Resume / ATS download.
- **Fix Resume** uses Gemini to tailor the student resume JSON to the job, then saves via the Nexus Partners student API. Optional `improvements[]` can guide the rewrite.
- **ATS score** on library entries is Gemini-scored (target **90+**) and includes `atsImprovements`, `atsSummary`, `atsMeetsTarget`.
- **Download ATS Resume** builds a job-specific ATS DOCX via the resume build API.
- **Student resume form** (`GET /students/{phone}/resume-form` and apply `studentForm`) returns the ticket form the student filled, including **resume email password in plain text**, for recruiter copy/paste into external apply sites. Only assigned recruiters can access it.

servers.description: Recruiter API base path (prepend your server host, e.g. https://api.nexuspartners.com)

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Home KPIs, trends, and recent activity

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: Scraped jobs matched to a student

tags.name: Resume Library
tags.description: Persisted job-specific resumes generated by the recruiter

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Global search across students, jobs, and applications

RecruiterBearerAuth.description: JWT from POST /auth/login. Expires per RECRUITER_JWT_EXPIRES_IN (default 12h).

companySlug.description: Optional. Defaults to platform admin company when omitted.

targetRole.description: Alias of role for My Students table

subscriptionStatus.description: Derived from active SubscriptionSchedule; expiring = due within 7 days

applicationCount.description: Non-dropped application/actions for this student by the recruiter

details.description: Raw student profile from Nexus Partners student API

notes.example: Strong React background. Prefer remote roles.

workType.description: Derived work type for job cards

minExperienceYears.description: Minimum required experience in years (derived from seniority/text when not explicit)

maxExperienceYears.description: Maximum required experience in years (derived from seniority/text when not explicit)

salaryRange.description: Formatted salary range; empty when unknown

visaSponsorship.description: Heuristic from job description/notes (H1B / sponsorship keywords). Same value as `isSponsored`.

isSponsored.description: Alias of `visaSponsorship`. Use for Sponsored badges/filters on job cards.

isApplied.description: True when this student already applied (or progressed past apply) for this job. True for statuses: applied, interview_scheduled, interview_completed, offer_received, hired, rejected. False when there is no action or only saved.

metaLine.example: Acme Corp · Remote · US · $120k–$150k · 3 days ago

urlDomain.description: Scrape/board domain when available. Do not display on recruiter job cards; use `sourceLabel` only if a source badge is needed.

improvements.description: Optional ATS improvement points to prioritize during Gemini fix (usually from libraryEntry.atsImprovements)

StudentResumeFormResponse.description: Student-filled ticket resume form for recruiter apply copy/paste UI. Includes resume email password in plain text for assigned recruiters only.

hasForm.description: false when the student has not filled a resume form yet

rows.description: Simple label/value list for display (password included in plain text)

fields.description: Copy-friendly fields. Look for key `resumeEmailPassword` when filling external apply forms.

key.description: Stable field id (e.g. preferredName, resumeEmail, resumeEmailPassword, city)

formData.description: Full normalized resume form JSON (includes resumeEmailPassword)

message.example: No resume form has been filled for this student yet

applyUrl.description: External apply URL — open in browser

studentForm.description: Same payload as GET /students/{phone}/resume-form for side-by-side copy/paste while applying

notes.description: Optional notes stored on the action

atsScore.description: Gemini ATS score (0-100). Client target is 90+.

atsSummary.description: Short Gemini summary of overall ATS fit

atsImprovements.description: Actionable improvement points from Gemini. Empty or short when score is already 90+.

source.description: How the library entry was created/updated

resumeData.description: Full tailored resume JSON when available

assignedStudentsDelta.description: Students created this calendar month (when raw.createdAt available)

post.description: Authenticate with username and password. Returns JWT access token.

400.description: Missing fields or company not found

get.description: Home screen metrics for the logged-in recruiter: assigned students, applications, interviews, resume generations, daily trend, and recent activity feed.
Application counts by status, top students by applications, resume count, hired count, and conversion rate.
Search assigned students, open jobs, and applications. Empty `q` returns empty arrays.

200.description: Grouped search results (up to 20 per group)

get.description: Activity-derived notifications from the last 7 days of dashboard activity (stub feed for desktop UI).
Returns students assigned to the logged-in recruiter, enriched with resume status, subscription status, application count, and next due date.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search by name, phone, email, or role

get.description: Full student profile including notes, tickets, payments, subscription, and activity counts.
Counts of jobs marked as applied for this student (today / week / month).

Returns the ticket resume form the student filled, as label/value rows and copy-friendly fields.

**Security note:** `resumeEmailPassword` is returned in **plain text** so recruiters can paste it into external job applications. Only recruiters assigned to the student can call this endpoint.

Use this to render a side panel while opening the job `applyUrl`.

200.description: Resume form payload (hasForm may be false if student never filled the form)

get.description: Paginated application/actions for the logged-in recruiter. Default excludes `dropped`. Includes status option list for UI filters.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by a single status (including dropped). Omit for all tracker statuses.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search student name/phone, company, or job title

patch.description: Move an application through the tracker pipeline. Preserves original `appliedAt` when already set.

get.description: Company interviews whose student phone matches one of the recruiter's assigned students.

Returns scraped open jobs matched to the student's **role** (title keywords from the assigned student's role, e.g. Software Engineer / Data Engineer) unless free-text `q` is provided. Excludes dropped jobs.

Each job includes enriched card fields: `sourceLabel`, `salaryRange`, `postedAge`, `workType`, `visaSponsorship`, `isSponsored`, `isApplied`, `tags`, `metaLine`, plus `minExperienceYears` / `maxExperienceYears`.

**UI guidance:** show `isApplied` / `isSponsored` badges on cards; do **not** display `urlDomain` (scrape source).

**Experience filter:** `minExp` and/or `maxExp` (aliases `experienceMin` / `experienceMax`) keep jobs whose experience band overlaps the requested range.

**Sponsored filter:** `sponsored` (alias `isSponsored`) as `true` or `false` filters by visa-sponsorship keywords in description/notes.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search title, company, location, description, or skills. When set, skips strict role matching.

parameters.name: sponsored
parameters.description: Filter by visa sponsorship mention in job text. `true` = sponsored only; `false` = not sponsored. Alias: `isSponsored`.

parameters.name: minExp
parameters.description: Minimum experience years filter. Returns jobs whose experience band overlaps this value (alias: experienceMin).

parameters.name: maxExp
parameters.description: Maximum experience years filter. Returns jobs whose experience band overlaps this value (alias: experienceMax).

parameters.name: scrapedFrom
parameters.description: Filter jobs scraped on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: scrapedTo
parameters.description: Filter jobs scraped on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

get.description: Job details plus applicant (student) context for the given `studentPhone`. The `job` object is enriched the same way as list items: includes `isApplied`, `isSponsored` / `visaSponsorship`, `studentAction`, and other card fields. Clients should not display `urlDomain` on the detail header.

post.description: Marks the job as dropped for this student. Dropped jobs are excluded from future job lists.

Records application for this student, returns the external `applyUrl` to open in a browser, and includes `studentForm` (same shape as `GET /students/{phone}/resume-form`) for a side-by-side copy/paste panel.

**App UX:** open `applyUrl` and render `studentForm.fields` next to it. Password is included in plain text under key `resumeEmailPassword`.

get.description: Persisted resumes created via Fix Resume / ATS download for this recruiter.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search student name/phone, job title, or company

post.description: Re-runs Fix Resume for the linked student/job using stored atsImprovements, then Gemini re-scores the result (target 90+).

Uses Gemini to tailor the student's resume JSON to this job (optionally guided by atsImprovements), saves it, records resumeFixedAt, upserts a Resume Library entry, and Gemini-scores ATS (target 90+).
Builds a job-specific ATS resume PDF via the Nexus Partners resume build API. Optionally pass templateId. Also upserts a Resume Library entry.

patch.description: Update name, email, and/or phone on the logged-in recruiter account.
